_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: No effect on cell growth/proliferation of the sNF96.2 cells was noted following transfection with the miR-29c mimics using a number of assays, including...the MTS assay
details: Used to assess cell proliferation, showed no effect of miR-29c on sNF96.2 cell growth
